sizing_rule.note: Allocate capital between tangent portfolio (point B on efficient frontier) and risk-free asset by maximizing Sharpe ratio: (AHPR-(1+RFR))/SD. Author identified peak Sharpe of 0.502265 at allocation coordinates (0.02986, 1.03). Optimal allocation point determines position sizing between risky and risk-free assets.

source_rule_text: Allocate portfolio between the tangent portfolio (point B on the efficient frontier) and the risk-free asset based on the Capital Market Line, where the optimal allocation is determined by maximizing the Sharpe ratio equation (AHPR-(1+RFR))/SD.
